steps.title: Calculate the retail price from the wholesale price
steps.content:
The retail price is 290% of the wholesale price. Since 290% equals 2.9, multiply:
$$\text{Retail price} = 2.9 \times 8.00 = 23.20$$
The retail price is $23.20.

steps.title: Apply the 70% discount to get the final price
steps.content:
A discount of 70% off means the customer pays the remaining 30% of the retail price (since 100% - 70% = 30%):
$$\text{Discounted price} = 0.30 \times 23.20 = 6.96$$
The discounted price of each remaining jacket is $6.96.
